title: Rename device - new name on the Support device card
scenario: Renamed device name is not reflected on the Support device card in the Poly Studio Mobile app
steps: 1. Open the Poly Studio Mobile app on your Android device.
2. Ensure a supported Poly Bluetooth audio device (e.g., Poly Voyager Focus 2) is connected.
3. From the Home screen, tap on the connected [Device Name] to open Device Settings.
4. Tap on the device name field and rename it to a new name (e.g., "My Poly Headset").
6. Navigate back to the Home screen.
7. Tap the Menu icon (three lines) in the top-left corner.
9. On the Support screen, locate the device card for the renamed device.
10. Tap on the device name displayed on the card.
expected: The device name displayed on the Support device card should reflect the new name that was set in Device Settings.
